mapper.select: SELECT dr.*, mt.tech_name, mt.tech_price FROM disposal_request dr LEFT JOIN medical_technology mt ON dr.medical_technology_id = mt.id WHERE dr.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY dr.creation_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE disposal_request SET disposal_result = #{disposalResult}, disposal_employee_id = #{disposalEmployeeId}, disposal_state = 'COMPLETED', disposal_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, disposal_remark = #{disposalRemark} WHERE id = #{id}
